error_signature: email body loses formatting when sent
title: Email body loses formatting when using Send Email node
symptom: When pulling the email body from AirTable into the HTML section, the formatting is lost, resulting in a single block of text.
applies_when: Email body is pulled from AirTable in rich text format
not_this_if: Using a different email sending service
root_cause: The data pulled from AirTable may not be valid HTML, leading to loss of formatting when processed by the Send Email node. The node expects properly formatted HTML to maintain structure like paragraphs.
fix_steps: Store the email body as valid HTML in AirTable

Alternatively, convert the rich text to HTML by replacing line breaks with
tags
Use the converted HTML in the Send Email node
agent_instruction: Ensure the email body is valid HTML before sending it through the Send Email node.
